'''âw-h-w''' ('''kawahaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heliski|heliski]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heliski|heliski]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-h-w
|-
! Lemma
| kawahaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwahaw|thiwahaw]] || [[word:jiwahaw|jiwahaw]] || [[word:shiwahaw|shiwahaw]] || [[word:kiwahaw|kiwahaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwahaw|thuthuwahaw]] || [[word:jujuwahaw|jujuwahaw]] || [[word:shushuwahaw|shushuwahaw]] || [[word:kukuwahaw|kukuwahaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwahaw|thuwahaw]] || [[word:juwahaw|juwahaw]] || [[word:shuwahaw|shuwahaw]] || [[word:kuwahaw|kuwahaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwahaw|thuwahaw]] || [[word:juwahaw|juwahaw]] || [[word:shuwahaw|shuwahaw]] || [[word:kuwahaw|kuwahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewahaw|thewahaw]] || [[word:jewahaw|jewahaw]] || [[word:shewahaw|shewahaw]] || [[word:kewahaw|kewahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowahaw|thothowahaw]] || [[word:jojowahaw|jojowahaw]] || [[word:shoshowahaw|shoshowahaw]] || [[word:kokowahaw|kokowahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowahaw|thowahaw]] || [[word:jowahaw|jowahaw]] || [[word:showahaw|showahaw]] || [[word:kowahaw|kowahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowahaw|thowahaw]] || [[word:jowahaw|jowahaw]] || [[word:showahaw|showahaw]] || [[word:kowahaw|kowahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwahaw|thĂŠwahaw]] || [[word:jĂŠwahaw|jĂŠwahaw]] || [[word:shĂŠwahaw|shĂŠwahaw]] || [[word:kĂŠwahaw|kĂŠwahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawahaw|thathawahaw]] || [[word:jajawahaw|jajawahaw]] || [[word:shashawahaw|shashawahaw]] || [[word:kakawahaw|kakawahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawahaw|thawahaw]] || [[word:jawahaw|jawahaw]] || [[word:shawahaw|shawahaw]] || [[word:kawahaw|kawahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawahaw|thawahaw]] || [[word:jawahaw|jawahaw]] || [[word:shawahaw|shawahaw]] || [[word:kawahaw|kawahaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawahaw|shawahaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawahaw|goshawahaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawahaw|gokishawahaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawahawnĂŒ|shawahawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawahawnknĂŒ|goshawahawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahawnĂŒ|gokishawahawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawahawshĂ«|shawahawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawahawnkshĂ«|goshawahawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawahawshĂ«|gokishawahawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahawro|shawahawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahawnkro|goshawahawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahawro|gokishawahawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahawmu|shawahawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahawnkmu|goshawahawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahawmu|gokishawahawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawahawsher|shawahawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawahawnksher|goshawahawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawahawsher|gokishawahawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawahawng|shawahawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawahawnkng|goshawahawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawahawng|gokishawahawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawahawya|shawahawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawahawnkya|goshawahawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawahawya|gokishawahawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawahawyam|shawahawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawahawnkyam|goshawahawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawahawyam|gokishawahawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahawnĂŒshĂ«|shawahawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawahawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawahawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahawnĂŒro|shawahawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahawnknĂŒro|goshawahawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahawnĂŒro|gokishawahawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahawnĂŒmu|shawahawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahawnknĂŒmu|goshawahawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahawnĂŒmu|gokishawahawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahawshĂ«nĂŒ|shawahawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawahawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawahawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahawshĂ«ro|shawahawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahawnkshĂ«ro|goshawahawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahawshĂ«ro|gokishawahawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahawshĂ«mu|shawahawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahawnkshĂ«mu|goshawahawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahawshĂ«mu|gokishawahawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahawronĂŒ|shawahawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahawnkronĂŒ|goshawahawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahawronĂŒ|gokishawahawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahawroshĂ«|shawahawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahawnkroshĂ«|goshawahawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahawroshĂ«|gokishawahawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahawromu|shawahawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahawnkromu|goshawahawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahawromu|gokishawahawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahawmunĂŒ|shawahawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahawnkmunĂŒ|goshawahawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahawmunĂŒ|gokishawahawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahawmushĂ«|shawahawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahawnkmushĂ«|goshawahawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahawmushĂ«|gokishawahawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahawmuro|shawahawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahawnkmuro|goshawahawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahawmuro|gokishawahawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
